name: Film Artist Search

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added Artifiact Attestation step in GH Release Workflow. 
- Adherance to sentence case lint rule from Obsidian ESLint plugin.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Basic featureset for the plugin,

1. Search for Film Artists (Actors, Directors, Producers, Writers)
2. Create notes using the in-built template or a user supplied template
3. Local download of Artist images (optional)
4. Secret Storage using newer Obsidian Secret Storage API. 
5. Update existing Film Artist note.
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release
